# Build CCI sets

```{r cci-config}
# ── GLOBAL CONFIG ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
TOP_N_CCI    <- 500
GENE_OF_INT  <- "AXL"
SEED         <- 42
# DATASET_LABELS, ds_short_map, ds_cancer_map, source_colors: config/hnsc_datasets.R
```

```{r cci-build-sets}
# ── BUILD PER-DATASET CCI SETS ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Bassez_top_cci_sets   <- build_gene_cci_sets(Bassez2021_Breast_step4.malignant,   top_n = TOP_N_CCI)
# Qian_top_cci_sets     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Qian2020_Breast_step4.malignant,     top_n = TOP_N_CCI)
# Wu_top_cci_sets       <- build_gene_cci_sets(Wu2021_Breast_step4.malignant,       top_n = TOP_N_CCI)
# Chan_top_cci_sets     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Chan2021_Lung_step4.malignant,       top_n = TOP_N_CCI)
# Laughney_top_cci_sets <- build_gene_cci_sets(Laughney2020_Lung_step4.malignant,   top_n = TOP_N_CCI)
# Xing_top_cci_sets     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Xing2021_Lung_step4.malignant,       top_n = TOP_N_CCI)
Kurten_top_cci_sets   <- build_gene_cci_sets(Kurten_HNSC.malignant,               top_n = TOP_N_CCI)
Puram_top_cci_sets    <- build_gene_cci_sets(Puram_HNSC.malignant,                top_n = TOP_N_CCI)
Choi_top_cci_sets     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Choi_HNSC.malignant,                 top_n = TOP_N_CCI)
Bill_top_cci_sets     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Bill_HNSC.malignant,                 top_n = TOP_N_CCI)

# message("Genes in Bassez:   ", length(Bassez_top_cci_sets))
# message("Genes in Qian:     ", length(Qian_top_cci_sets))
# message("Genes in Wu:       ", length(Wu_top_cci_sets))
# message("Genes in Chan:     ", length(Chan_top_cci_sets))
# message("Genes in Laughney: ", length(Laughney_top_cci_sets))
# message("Genes in Xing:     ", length(Xing_top_cci_sets))
message("Genes in Kurten:   ", length(Kurten_top_cci_sets))
message("Genes in Puram:    ", length(Puram_top_cci_sets))
message("Genes in Choi:     ", length(Choi_top_cci_sets))
message("Genes in Bill:     ", length(Bill_top_cci_sets))

# ── COMBINED CCI SET LIST (used by all downstream chunks) ─────────────────────
all_top_cci_sets <- list(
  # Bassez2021_Breast_step4   = Bassez_top_cci_sets,
  # Qian2020_Breast_step4     = Qian_top_cci_sets,
  # Wu2021_Breast_step4       = Wu_top_cci_sets,
  # Chan2021_Lung_step4       = Chan_top_cci_sets,
  # Laughney2020_Lung_step4   = Laughney_top_cci_sets,
  # Xing2021_Lung_step4       = Xing_top_cci_sets,
  Kurten_HNSC               = Kurten_top_cci_sets,
  Puram_HNSC                = Puram_top_cci_sets,
  Choi_HNSC                 = Choi_top_cci_sets,
  Bill_HNSC                 = Bill_top_cci_sets
)

# ── RANKED CCI SETS (full list, no truncation — used by Average Overlap) ─────
# Bassez_cci_sets_ranked   <- build_gene_cci_sets(Bassez2021_Breast_step4.malignant,   top_n = NULL)
# Qian_cci_sets_ranked     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Qian2020_Breast_step4.malignant,     top_n = NULL)
# Wu_cci_sets_ranked       <- build_gene_cci_sets(Wu2021_Breast_step4.malignant,       top_n = NULL)
# Chan_cci_sets_ranked     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Chan2021_Lung_step4.malignant,       top_n = NULL)
# Laughney_cci_sets_ranked <- build_gene_cci_sets(Laughney2020_Lung_step4.malignant,   top_n = NULL)
# Xing_cci_sets_ranked     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Xing2021_Lung_step4.malignant,       top_n = NULL)
Kurten_cci_sets_ranked   <- build_gene_cci_sets(Kurten_HNSC.malignant,               top_n = NULL)
Puram_cci_sets_ranked    <- build_gene_cci_sets(Puram_HNSC.malignant,                top_n = NULL)
Choi_cci_sets_ranked     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Choi_HNSC.malignant,                 top_n = NULL)
Bill_cci_sets_ranked     <- build_gene_cci_sets(Bill_HNSC.malignant,                 top_n = NULL)

all_cci_sets_ranked <- list(
  Kurten_HNSC = Kurten_cci_sets_ranked,
  Puram_HNSC  = Puram_cci_sets_ranked,
  Choi_HNSC   = Choi_cci_sets_ranked,
  Bill_HNSC   = Bill_cci_sets_ranked
)

# ── GENE-CCI INSPECTION TABLE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# One tidy data frame per dataset: Gene | n_CCIs | CCI (one row per gene-CCI pair).
# Usage: View(gene_cci_top500_summary$Bassez2021_Breast_step4)

gene_cci_top500_summary <- purrr::imap(all_top_cci_sets, function(ds_sets, ds_name) {
  
  # Step 1: Create the un-arranged data frame
  df <- purrr::imap_dfr(ds_sets, function(cci_vec, gene) {
    if (length(cci_vec) == 0) return(NULL)
    
    data.frame(
      Gene = gene, 
      n_CCIs = length(cci_vec), 
      CCI = cci_vec,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
  
  # Step 2: Check if the resulting data frame is empty
  # If it is, return an empty data frame with the correct columns to prevent errors
  if (nrow(df) == 0 || !("Gene" %in% names(df))) {
    return(data.frame(
      Gene = character(), 
      n_CCIs = integer(), 
      CCI = character(), 
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ))
  }
  
  # Step 3: If not empty, arrange and return
  df %>% arrange(.data$Gene, .data$CCI)
})

message("gene_cci_top500_summary ready — datasets: ",
        paste(names(gene_cci_top500_summary), collapse = ", "))

# ── Quick inspection (uncomment to run interactively) ─────────────────────────
# View(gene_cci_top500_summary$Bassez2021_Breast_step4)
# View(gene_cci_top500_summary$Qian2020_Breast_step4)
# View(gene_cci_top500_summary$Wu2021_Breast_step4)
# View(gene_cci_top500_summary$Chan2021_Lung_step4)
# View(gene_cci_top500_summary$Laughney2020_Lung_step4)
# View(gene_cci_top500_summary$Xing2021_Lung_step4)
```
